Table of Contents

Interface INetworkSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a source in a network dataset.

[Guid("10F8D75C-1D54-4F2A-8CE8-FB7D50A0DF1D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkSource

Properties

ElementType

Network element type of this network source.

esriNetworkElementType ElementType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkElementType

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryType

The enumerated geometry type.

esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryType

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

Unique identifier of this network source.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Name of the class associated with this network source.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

NetworkSourceDirections

The directions settings for this network source.

INetworkSourceDirections NetworkSourceDirections { get; set; }

Property Value

INetworkSourceDirections

Examples

Sample Snippet

Properties

Property set of this network source.

IPropertySet Properties { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

SourceType

Type of network source.

esriNetworkSourceType SourceType { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkSourceType

Examples

Sample Snippet

UsesGeometryInConnectivity

Indicates if the source object's geometry is used in determining network connectivity.

bool UsesGeometryInConnectivity { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
